plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-277 RP08.P02.M04.S19-RP08.P02.M06.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-277 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP08.P02.M04 secondary workflow test tail (happy/denied/review/integration rows), the full M05 permission/audit binding service cycle (22 rows), and the M06 synthetic fixture head (14 rows through review-required routing) across three sections over 40 planned rows with a pack-local row-extras constant, Hermes evidence (H08), Claude review packet (C08), and CP00-278 handoff, without opening email/Office-native/sync/filing runtime, review/approval route runtime, rollback/retry runtime, lock acquisition, idempotency persistence, state writes, object storage, command runtime execution, Hermes runtime receipts, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-277 is a verified descriptor-only RP08 Email-And-Office-Native-DMS service-binding-slice pack (40 units, Risk B, range RP08.P02.M04.S19–RP08.P02.M06.S14, building on CP00-276 and handing off to CP00-278/RP08.P02.M06.S15). Reviewed read-only via Read/Grep/Glob; no Bash, edits, writes, or connector calls used.

Implementation integrity: registry.js, service.js, and validators.js define the CP277 binding, requirements, no-write attestation, case set, descriptor, Hermes evidence packet, and Claude review packet. freezeCp277Result and per-row guards keep every runtime-behavior flag false (descriptor_only true; runtime_execution/customer_safe-runtime/raw_payload all false). validateEmailDmsCoreCp277Coverage and validateEmailDmsCoreCp277ServiceBindingSliceDescriptor enforce unit count (40), RP08-only IDs, no duplicate IDs, deliverable counts (claude_review 2 + contract 2 + failure_recovery 2 + implementation 17 + security_audit 4 + test 8 + ui 5 = 40), micro distributions (M04=4, M05=22, M06=14), cross-tenant/deny-over-allow/audit/state/idempotency/lock/persistence/validation/blocked-claim/rollback/retry guards, and authority boundaries. Tests in model.test.js assert coverage validity, 40 units, M05=22, descriptor-only rows, deny_over_allow_enforced true, cross_tenant_access_allowed false, claude.read_only true, and the CP00-278 handoff. The contract (current_pack_id CP00-277, current_pack block, top-level no_write_attestation with validates_service_binding_slice_descriptor_only true, historical_pack_bindings ending at CP00-277) is well-formed and matches the binding; validate-rp08-email-dms-core-contract.mjs is read-only and deep-equality-asserts the binding/attestation/descriptor and false authority booleans.

Production-readiness gate: production_ready is correctly false (status implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout; gate_outcome implementation_gates_passed_post_review_closeout_pending) — not a premature enterprise-trust claim. no_real_data true, writes_product_state false; all 20 node --check/--test, rp05–rp08, plan/weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validates, npm test/validate/build, and git diff --check commands exit 0; Hermes gate H08 passed.

Review-hardening (CP178+): auth_preflight passed (exit 0, valid non-empty JSON result, 1224-byte stdout — not 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped); forbidden_tools_present false; source_inspection_mode read_tools_used (allowed); summary_only_review_allowed false honored; review-schema present; review_hardening.invalid_attempts_preserved [].

Boundaries: Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and NOT final approver (promotes_claude_to_final_approval false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation false consistently across the contract; human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true). Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product false). Unrelated dirty files (Enterprise SaaS .docx, docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md, docs/closeout-packs/cp00-277/, docs/ldip-integration/.../c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt-01.json) are correctly preserved as out-of-scope with active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted []. Note (non-finding, out of scope): the c-ldip-01 artifact reports an embedded system-reminder injection block in the out-of-scope new-session-handoff.md; it does not affect CP00-277.

No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects identified. Pack is consistent, bounded, and ready for post-review closeout under the existing non-final-approval, human-gated trust model.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-277 email dms core service binding slice descriptor pack
